snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 4 | Plan B Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

UPSC is one of the toughest exams in the world with a success rate of less than 1%. As an Aspirant, you can’t ignore the fact that you might not crack it. Abhilash realizes this after talking to SK and Guri, they tell him everyone needs a Plan B. On the other hand, he is also being pressured by his company to end his sabbatical and join again. What will Abhilash do now? What will be his Plan B?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC: Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Special Mention: Nilotpal Bora for Dhaaga

UPSC fact #91: Satyendra worked as a clerk in the excise department, his marriage was arranged with Aarti. But Aarti ran away a night before their wedding because she found out that she had cleared the PCS exam. Satyendra who was initially heartbroken worked really hard and became an IAS officer. Eventually, Aarti came back into his life and they got married.
PS: It’s a True Story.
-Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra’s Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin 

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳
🎧 JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/tu-bhi-sataya-jayega/6aU5iFSLJ3c_

snippet.title: Kareeb | Goldie Sohel | Siddharth Nigam | Ashi Singh | Vishal D |Kunaal V |Official Video |TM Music
snippet.description:
When a crush leads to playful flirting and ends up as love! 
This is what Kareeb is about. A fun, peppy song, composed by Goldie Sohel to Kunaal Vermaa's lyrics, sung by Vishal Dadlani, will appeal to millennials and also create nostalgia for many from older generations.

#Kareeb #SiddharthNigam #AshiSingh

----------------------------------------------------------------
Music Composed by Goldie Sohel
Written by Kunaal Vermaa
Singer - Vishal Dadlani

Music Produced and Arranged by Goldie Sohel
Sound Designer - Manash Borthakur

Guitars - Ishan Das 
Bass - Himangshu Borah 
Saxophones - I D Rao 
Backing Vocals Arranged and designed by Shreya Phukan

Vishal's Vocals recorded at YRF studios by Vijay Dayal
Vocal Design and Edit by DJ Phukan
Instruments and Backing Vocals recorded at Neo Sound by Pranjal Borah

Mixed by Pankaj Borah at Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant - Pranjal Borah 

Mastered by Sunny M.R.

Video:
Featuring - Siddharth Nigam & Ashi Singh
Video Director - United White Flag - Ramji Gulati
Choreographed by - Shashank Dogra
Casting by - Purple Star Entertainment - Forum Vaghela
DOP - Rahul Arora
Editor - Varun Arora
VFX - Vishal Panchal
Drone - Tanish Arora
Styling - Dharti Gulati
Production - Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
Makeup & Hair - Ishan Malhotra
Photography - Anish Ajmera
Team UWF - Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
----------------------------------------------------------------

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪

Amazon Music - Apple Music - Gaana - Spotify - Wynk - Jio Saavn - Hungama - Resso - YouTube Music.

Connect with the song: https://tmmusic.fanlink.to/Kareeb

----------------------------------------------------------------
Lyrics :

Dekha tune
Dekha Maine
Chori Chori Yun to sau dafa
Sau Dafa

Jeele thoda
Ho na jaaye
Baton baton mein hi yu subha
Yu Subha
Sau baaton ki baat hai ek main hu tera.. toh kya sochna
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb

Aaya tu jab se nazron mein
Maine fir khwab dekha na
Hoga kal se ye khabron mein
Teri haan ki bachi hai deriyaan
Tu rahega mere zikron mein
Ab kabhi koi hoga na
Keh na paau chaahe lafzon mein
Phir bhi karta rahunga main bayaan
Tu chaahiye baaki Kar li hai
Maine saari tai yaariyan..
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
----------------------------------------------------------------

Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Wafa Na Raas Aayee" in the voice of Jubin Nautiyal, music by Meet Bros, lyrics are written by Rashmi Virag. The song features Himansh Kohli, Arushi Nishank & Rohit Suchanti. The video is directed by Ashish Panda.

snippet.title: Ramyug | Official Trailer | Kunal Kohli | MX Original Series | MX Player
snippet.description:
Ek andekhe roop mein धर्म aur अधर्म ka paath padhaane aa raha hai रामयुग!

All episodes of #Ramyug out on 6th May.

Directed by Kunal Kohli

Key Cast: Diganth Manchale, Akkshay Dogra, Aishwarya Ojha, Kabir Duhan Singh, Vivan Bhatena, Navdeep Pallapolu, Anish John Kokken, Shishir Mohan Sharma, Jatin Sial, Shweta Gulati, Suparna Marwah, Mamta Verma, Tisca Chopra, Dalip Tahil, Anup Soni, Vikram Singh Chauhan, Hemant Kumar Pandey, Arun Singh, Ravi Jhankal, Shaan Grover, Amit Madan Gaur, Teena Singh and Danish Akhtar

About Ramyug: 
Rama, prince of Ayodhya, won the hand of the beautiful princess Sita, but was exiled with her and his brother Laksmana for 14 years through the plotting of his stepmother. In the forest, Sita was abducted by Ravana, and Rama with the help of Son of Vayu, Hanuman, gathered an army of monkeys and bears to search for her. The allies attacked Lanka, killed Ravana, and rescued Sita. After the couple's triumphant return to Ayodhya, Rama's righteous rule (Ram-raj) inaugurated a golden age for all mankind. 

The epic's poetic stature and marvelous story means that the story of Rama has been constantly retold by some of India's greatest writers both in Sanskrit and regional languages. It is one of the staples of various dramatic traditions, in court drama, dance-dramas, and in shadow-puppet theatres. In northern India, the annual Ram-lila or 'Rama-play' is performed at the autumn festival of Dassehra to celebrate with Rama and Sita the eventual triumph of light over darkness.

Ramyug the latest visual interpretation of this ancient text, seeks to bring modern technology in a never before used manner to narrate the epic.

#MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer #KunalKohli #DiganthManchale #AkkshayDogra #AishwaryaOjha #KabirDuhanSingh #VivanBhatena #NavdeepPallapolu #AnishJohnKokken #ShishirMohanSharma #JatinSial #ShwetaGulati #SuparnaMarwah #MamtaVerma #TiscaChopra #DalipTahil #AnupSoni #VikramSinghChauhan #HemantKumarPandey #ArunSingh #RaviJhankal #ShaanGrover #AmitMadanGaur #TeenaSingh #DanishAkhtar

snippet.title: LIVE - Full Moon Meditation with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar | Health | Happiness | Healing
snippet.description:
Join the world's most effortless meditation program - Sahaj Samadhi Meditation : Online with Bhanumathi Narasimhan from 7-9th May on http://aoliv.in/meditation



Maximize happiness, health & immunity. Cut down stress, anxiety, and depression! Learn the powerful breathing technique Sudarshan Kriya, along with Pranayama, Yoga, Meditation and Practical Tips for everyday living in the online Meditation and Breath workshop (The Art of Living Happiness Program).

 Register now 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

ar.description:
انضم إلى برنامج التأمل الأكثر جهدًا في العالم - Sahaj Samadhi Meditation: عبر الإنترنت مع Bhanumathi Narasimhan من 7 إلى 9 مايو على http://aoliv.in/meditation



 تعظيم السعادة والصحة والمناعة. قلل من التوتر والقلق والاكتئاب! تعلم تقنية التنفس القوية Sudarshan Kriya ، جنبًا إلى جنب مع Pranayama واليوجا والتأمل والنصائح العملية للحياة اليومية في ورشة عمل التأمل والنفس عبر الإنترنت (برنامج Art of Living Happiness Program).

 سجل الآن 👉🏽 https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 حول جوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار

 غوروديف سري سري رافي شانكار هو زعيم روحي إنساني مشهور عالميًا وسفير السلام والقيم الإنسانية. من خلال حياته وعمله ، ألهم Gurudev الملايين حول العالم برؤية لعالم خالٍ من التوتر والعنف.
 أسس جوروديف The Art of Living ، وهي منظمة غير ربحية تشارك في إدارة الإجهاد ومبادرات الخدمة. تعمل البرامج التي صممها Gurudev على تمكين الأشخاص من خلال التقنيات والأدوات ليعيشوا حياة أعمق وأكثر سعادة.

 #GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

hi.title: LIVE - गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के साथ पूर्णिमा ध्यान | स्वास्थ्य | खुशी | उपचारात्मक
hi.description:
दुनिया के सबसे सहज ध्यान कार्यक्रम में शामिल हों - सहज समाधि ध्यान: भानुमति नरसिम्हन के साथ ऑनलाइन 7-9 मई से http://aoliv.in/meditation पर



 खुशी, स्वास्थ्य और प्रतिरक्षा को अधिकतम करें। तनाव, चिंता और अवसाद में कटौती करें! ऑनलाइन मेडिटेशन और ब्रीथ वर्कशॉप (द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग हैप्पीनेस प्रोग्राम) में रोजमर्रा की जिंदगी के लिए प्राणायाम, योग, ध्यान और व्यावहारिक टिप्स के साथ शक्तिशाली श्वास तकनीक सुदर्शन क्रिया सीखें।

 अब रजिस्टर करें a https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर के बारे में

 गुरुदेव श्री श्री रविशंकर विश्व प्रसिद्ध मानवतावादी, आध्यात्मिक नेता और शांति और मानवीय मूल्यों के राजदूत हैं। अपने जीवन और कार्य के माध्यम से, गुरुदेव ने दुनिया भर में लाखों लोगों को एक तनाव-मुक्त और हिंसा-मुक्त दुनिया की दृष्टि से प्रेरित किया।
 गुरुदेव ने द आर्ट ऑफ लिविंग की स्थापना की, जो एक गैर-लाभकारी संगठन है जो तनाव-प्रबंधन और सेवा की पहल में लगा हुआ है। गुरुदेव द्वारा डिजाइन किए गए कार्यक्रम तकनीक और उपकरणों के साथ लोगों को एक गहरी और आनंदमय जीवन जीने के लिए सशक्त बनाते हैं।

 # गुरुदेव श्रीश्री रविशंकर

snippet.title: Piyu Bole - Janaki Omkumar | GMC Thrissur
snippet.description:
A video done during lockdown last year 😌
- To propagate the need of love to oneself.

Initially, it was just a humble attempt at doing a choreograpy by @manishmandy @FAMOUS FAMILY but after the first rate editing from Rahul Venu, I couldn't give it a better caption than Balram versus Tharadas. 😂😂

But on further thought, jokes aside (yeah my cheesy acting), it is essential that you love and seek happiness in yourself to heal yourself and the people around you. Stop looking for the one. Be the one. Else you'll be just depending on another person to fill the voids within you. 🤷‍

Self love doesn't mean being narcissistic, or those extra selfies, it's about working on your relationship with yourself, through all the highs and lows and still be able to treat yourself with compassion and respect.And then one would never want to kill oneself. 

Secondarily, you will not let anyone walk through your mind with their feet dirty like MK Gandhi rightly said.And that's, the island to swim to.🍂🍀

#piyubole#selflove#quarantinedance  #indiandancers#dancersofindia india#whackingdance

snippet.title: Earthquake of 6.4 magnitude Jolts Northeast India | The Quint
snippet.description:
An earthquake measuring 6.4 on the Richter scale jolted parts of Northeast India. The epicentre of the quake was near Assam's Tezpur. The tremors were also felt in Meghalaya, West Bengal and Bhutan.

snippet.description:
Watch the Latest promo of the Tamil Serial #Chithi 2 that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th May 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @10.00 PM on Sun TV. 

#SunTV #Chithi2 #TamilSerial #Chithi2Serial #Fullepisode #VenbaKavin #KavinVenba

Story of Venba - an adopted child of her Chithi, who marries Kavin amidst strong disapproval of his family. snippet.title: Amit Saini Rohtakiya : Hawa Baji (Official Video) | Priya Soni | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
Amit Saini Rohtakiya : Hawa Baji (Official Video) | Priya Soni | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021

Sonotek Music Presents Full Video of New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021 Hawa Baji . Another Superhit Haryanvi Song Sung By Amit Saini Rohtakiya. Starring by Amit Saini Rohtakiya, Priya Soni  Music by GR Music. Lyrics are penned by Amit Saini Rohtakiya

#AMITSAINIROHTAKIYA​ #HawaBaji​  #NewHaryanviSongs​ 
#PriyaSoni #Hawabajisong #Haryanavi2021 #Sonotek
#Haryanavi2021​ #SonotekMusic​ #AmitsainiRohtakiya​

♪ Available on ♪
https://gaana.com/album/hawa-baji

Starring :-  Amit Saini Rohtakiya 
Singer :- Amit Saini Rohtakiya 
Lyrics :- Amit Saini Rohtakiya
Female Artist :- Priya Soni 
Music - GR Music (+918708626865)
Mixing & Mastering - GR Music (+918708626865) 
Edit Di :- Parveen $word
D.O.P :- Munish Sharma
Director :- Jeetu G
Producer : SONOTEK 
Label : Sonotek Music
Publicity Design :- Muku Jangra
Co Artist : Joginder Kundu, Sompal Kashyap 
Copyrights : Sonotek Cassettes Company

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SHARE !! SUBSCRIBE

Like us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/SonotekVideo​
https://www.facebook.com/Sonotek-Music-105304197912151
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/sonotekmusic​​
                                            https://www.instagram.com/sonotek_video


Song Lyrics 

 R Tu Muh P Kuch Hai 
Or Piche Kuch Or Hai 
   Do Char Facklanduva Mai
  Chaale Tera Jor Hai  
Bhai Bhai Kehke Seli maar kar Gya   
Ib Saini Dhokebazi Ni ni

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rrr Meri Photova Ne Paad Ke kai Chode Hore hai 
Rrr Kute Apne ilakya MaiRrr Makha  Ghode Hore hai
Amit tt Tu Sidha Hoke Takra Liye Rr Par Jall Saji Nii

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rr badmashi Ki Speech Thodi Makha Kam Diya Kar 
Rr Makha Tadke Badama Gelya Dudh Liya Kar 
Rrr Pani K Tu Bhar K Dram Rakhe se.  
Rrr Gani Hanji Hhanji Ni 

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

रै तू मुँह पै कुछ है  रै पाछै कुछ और है 
 दो चार फकलंडुआ मै रै चालै तेरा जोर है 
  रै भाई भाई कैहके सिली मार करग्या 
 इब  सैणी धोखेबाज़ी नी 
 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 
 झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै  घणी  हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै मेरी फोटुआ नै पाड़ कै कई चौड़े होरे है 
 रै कुत्ते अपणे इलाक्या मै रै मखा घोड़े होरे है 
अमित तै तू सीधा होकै टकरा लिए  
रोहतकिये  तै सीधा तू  टकरा लिए 
 पर जालसाज़ी  नी  

 रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी 

रै बदमाशी की स्पीच थोड़ी  मखा  कम दिया कर 
रै मखा तड़कै बादमा गेल्या  दूध लिया कर 
 रै  पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै  
रै मखा पाणी के तू भरकै  ड्राम राखै सै
   रै घणी हा जी हा जी नी 

रै हीरो झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
 रै मखा हवाबाज़ी नी 
झाल डाट ले टेम काट ले 
रै बेटे हवाबाज़ी नी

https://www.facebook.com/Sonotek-Musi...​

Follow us on Instagram - 
https://www.instagram.com/sonotekmusi...​

Episode 3154 : Bhide Calls For A Parent Teacher Meeting
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide is very concerned about his students future and their behaviour. None of the students are taking the online class seriously so he has called for an online PTA meeting. He is very upset so Tapu Sena comes in for the rescue and cheer him up. To know more watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 177 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
When Omkar enters a building in search of his daughter Tara, he gets attacked by goons. Tune in to the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO | VAARI JAWAN | Rimorav Vlogs
snippet.description:
Watch VAARI JAWAN Music video by RIMORAV VLOGS Presents RI VLOGS


VAMILY finally hum sabke hoge hai 5 Million Subscribers or hum dil se thank you kehna chahta hai aap sabko for the Continuous love and Continuous Support❤️

VAMILY humne song banna shuru kiya tha 2 weeks pehle 

Singer - VAMILY yeh ganna gaya hai RI Dude aur Rukhsar Bandhukia ji ne jinhone humara Oh damn and Mere rabba Gaya hai💛 Both are AWESOME!!🤟🏻

Music - VAMILY music humare RI dudy ne banaya hai humesha ki tarah 😍

Mixing and Mastering - VAMILY Mann Taneja ji ne awesome mixing Aur mastering ki hai aur unhone ne humara Oh damn and Mere Rabba ki bhi ki thi🔥

Lyrics - Lyrics RI dudy aur Maine ( Diksha) likhe hai.. we just love writing Lyrics ✍🏻🤩

Recording - Kishan uncle ne humare Stance Studio Mein RI bhaiyan ki Recording ki hai ( Saare sur lagvaye hai matlab koshish ki hai 🤪)

Camera - RI bhaiyan ka humesha se Sapna tha ki voh FILM camera pe shoot kare toh iss leye iss bar humne Sapna pura kiya ❤️😍 Bawa ji ne camera kiya hai matlab Super se bhi upper vala!

Kapde - Mummy aur Mamu thank you so much sapne humare liye itne mast Mast kapde la kar diye! 🤗

Decoration - Muskan didi thank you aapne on the Spot jaha decoration karvana same day Mein mushkil tha aapne kar dikhaya with Ankush Jiju ki help ... you guys are LOVE 🥰

Producer - PAPA ne ganna suneke baad kaha Rishi tu jese ganna shoot karna chahta hai kar main hoon na! Love you papa for that! 🥺❤️

Director - Hum team banakar kaam karte hai VAMILY toh agar kisi ne bhi koi bhi Idea diya ho hum usse bhi Director bolte hai toh iss leye har baar ki tarah hum sab ne milakar iss Music video ko banaya hai toh sab ka yogdaan barabar hai...💕

Helping hands - ThankYou Gupta uncle & Rocky hum sab keleye khane peene ka dyaan rakhne ke leye!🤗

Safety - VAMILY humne sari safety ka dyaan rakha hai during the shoot of song! 😷

VAMILY hum FUDGE ko bhi lana chahte the music video Mein par aapko pata hai na voh kita FRIENDLY hai 😅🐶 ( Love you Fudgiiii) 

 Sanjay thank you for not sleeping during shoot 😂🤗

Or hai yeh hai gaane ke Lyrics keep sharing and keep Loving -


vekh mai be aageya saj daj ke 
Tere piche-piche paj paj ke 

loki mainu tak de menu Raj Raj ke 
Raj raj ke x3
 
Teri akhoon mein koi toh raaz hai
Lage soni jab mere sath 
Yaar menu kehnde gall baat hai
Gall baat hai x3

Oh Tera pyaar mere yaar
Dil chahe baar baar 
Bs ehna hi mai chahuga

Meri mehngi-mehngi car 
Nale paise ne hazaar 
Bs tere pe lutana chahuga

Lak tera lak tera lak matkana 
Dil kare tenu bs takde java
Haye teri haye teri gallan utte 
Dil mera kare bs vaari java x2

Main tah vaari java x3

Mai taan teri hogayi 
Haan teri hogayi
Mai taan teri ho gayi 
Soneyaa.......

Meri gallan utte 
Tu vaari jave
Haye dill diya gallan 
Tenu samajh na aave 

Tu ashique challa
Reh geya kalla
Fer vi hateda 
Mera faddan toh of palla

Tera pyaar mere yaar
Dil chave baar baar 
Bs enha hi mai chahuni aa

Teri mehngi-mehngi car 
Nale paise ne hazaar 
Eh sabh mai na chahuni aa

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 212
snippet.description:
Swara uses a distraction to take Ragini's keys and hand them over to Durga Prasad. Later, Ranveer Singh at promotion of his movie saves Sanskaar's life.


#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: 'കുക്കൂ കുക്കൂ'; കോവിഡ് പാരഡി ഗാനവുമായി കേരള പോലീസ് | Mathrubhumi News
snippet.description:
കോവിഡ് പ്രതിരോധമുയര്‍ത്തി കേരള പോലീസ് തയ്യാറാക്കിയ പാരഡി ആല്‍ബമാണ് സമൂഹ മാധ്യമങ്ങളില്‍ ചര്‍ച്ചയായിരിക്കുന്നത്. കേരള പോലീസിന്റെ ഫേയ്‌സ്ബുക്ക് പേജിലാണ് ആല്‍ബം അപ്ലോഡ് ചെയ്തിരിക്കുന്നത്.

മാറുന്ന ലോകത്ത് കൂടുതൽ മാറ്റങ്ങളോടെ. പുതിയ വേഗത്തിൽ. പുതിയ ലുക്കിൽ.
മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്.
#MathrubhumiNews #വാസ്തവംതിരിച്ചറിയൂ.

Watch Mathrubhumi News Live at https://youtu.be/DhujH-qBWx0

Mathrubhumi News is now available on WhatsApp. Click https://mbi.page.link/MBNewsWAS to subscribe.

#MalayalamNews #MalayalamLatestNews #KeralaNews #MathrubhumiNews #Mathrubhumi #Malayalamnewslive #Malayalamlivenews #Latestmalayalamnews  #Breakingnews #Breakingnewskerala #Breakingnewslive

Connect with Mathrubhumi News:
Visit Mathrubhumi News's Website: http://www.mathrubhumi.com/tv/
Find Mathrubhumi News on Facebook: https://www.fb.com/mbnewsin/
-----------------------------------------------------
Mathrubhumi News (മലയാളം: മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്) is a 24-hour Malayalam television news channel and is one of Kerala's most viewed TV channels. Owing to its varied presentation style and reliable content, Mathrubhumi News has become the fastest-growing news channel in Kerala. More than just a news channel, Mathrubhumi News features a host of programs that relate to various aspects of life in Kerala. Some of the frontline shows of the channel are: 
- Wake Up Kerala, the Best Morning Show in Malayalam television.
- Njangalkum Parayanund, youth-centric viewers sourced discussion around the pressing topic of the day.
- Super Prime Time, the most discussed debate show during prime time in Kerala.
- Vakradrishti and Dhim Tharikida Thom, unmatchable satire shows.
- She Matters, the woman-centric daily show.
- Spark@3, the show on issues that light up the day.
- World Wide, a weekly round-up of all the important news from around the globe.

Happy viewing!

Mathrubhumi News is an initiative by The Mathrubhumi Printing & Publishing Co. Ltd.
Mathrubhumi News. All rights reserved ©.

കോവിഡ് പ്രതിരോധമുയര്‍ത്തി കേരള പോലീസ് തയ്യാറാക്കിയ പാരഡി ആല്‍ബമാണ് സമൂഹ മാധ്യമങ്ങളില്‍ ചര്‍ച്ചയായിരിക്കുന്നത്. കേരള പോലീസിന്റെ ഫേയ്‌സ്ബുക്ക് പേജിലാണ് ആല്‍ബം അപ്ലോഡ് ചെയ്തിരിക്കുന്നത്.

മാറുന്ന ലോകത്ത് കൂടുതൽ മാറ്റങ്ങളോടെ. പുതിയ വേഗത്തിൽ. പുതിയ ലുക്കിൽ.
മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്.
#MathrubhumiNews #വാസ്തവംതിരിച്ചറിയൂ.

Watch Mathrubhumi News Live at https://youtu.be/DhujH-qBWx0

Mathrubhumi News is now available on WhatsApp. Click https://mbi.page.link/MBNewsWAS to subscribe.

#MalayalamNews #MalayalamLatestNews #KeralaNews #MathrubhumiNews #Mathrubhumi #Malayalamnewslive #Malayalamlivenews #Latestmalayalamnews  #Breakingnews #Breakingnewskerala #Breakingnewslive

Connect with Mathrubhumi News:
Visit Mathrubhumi News's Website: http://www.mathrubhumi.com/tv/
Find Mathrubhumi News on Facebook: https://www.fb.com/mbnewsin/
-----------------------------------------------------
Mathrubhumi News (മലയാളം: മാതൃഭൂമി ന്യൂസ്) is a 24-hour Malayalam television news channel and is one of Kerala's most viewed TV channels. Owing to its varied presentation style and reliable content, Mathrubhumi News has become the fastest-growing news channel in Kerala. More than just a news channel, Mathrubhumi News features a host of programs that relate to various aspects of life in Kerala. Some of the frontline shows of the channel are: 
- Wake Up Kerala, the Best Morning Show in Malayalam television.
- Njangalkum Parayanund, youth-centric viewers sourced discussion around the pressing topic of the day.
- Super Prime Time, the most discussed debate show during prime time in Kerala.
- Vakradrishti and Dhim Tharikida Thom, unmatchable satire shows.
- She Matters, the woman-centric daily show.
- Spark@3, the show on issues that light up the day.
- World Wide, a weekly round-up of all the important news from around the globe.

Happy viewing!

Mathrubhumi News is an initiative by The Mathrubhumi Printing & Publishing Co. Ltd.

snippet.title: वायरस को कहे बाय बाय- बस 1 लड्डू खाये सारे विटामिन्स इम्युनिटी भर भर के पाए Immunity Booster Ladoo
snippet.description:
गर्मियों के लिए ख़ास शक्तिवर्धक ताकत बढ़ाने वाले लड्डू Laddu for strength immunity  , summer ladoo recipe, summer laduu recipe.#immunityboosterladdu  How to make immunity booster laddu at home, immunity booster laddu for summer 

https://youtu.be/wE-ENHZgAsg 1 बार में ही भयंकर से भयंकर सर्दी जुकाम खांसी दूर इम्युनिटी बढे भरपूर बनाये पावरफुल Immunity Booster
Immunity Booster Drink Food Ladoo Recipes https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDvXa-8AruVIsBuclAvZ8e2_MnYePkmld 

Subscribe Karein mere 2nd channel ko - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCD5oDvT5XRAjs1OEowHDHPQ SUBSCRIBE ☑️ : and Press Bell 🔔  https://goo.gl/mrC9oX 🙂
Cook with Parul Marathi - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpKlnc-3Ze9G8YEVb-jz5ew
FULL RECIPE LINK  https://cookwithparul.com/ 
Hume Facebook aur Instagram par Bhi follow keejiye👇🏻😊
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/CookwithParulGupta
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/cookwithparul/ 
********************************************************************
Ingredients List सामग्री
Lotus Seeds/Fox Nuts/Phool Makhana - 2 cups
Almonds - 1/4 cup
CashewNuts - 1/4 cup
Musk Melon Seeds - 1/4 cup
Ghee - 2 tbsp
Pepper Powder - 1/2 tsp
Desiccated Coconut - 1.5 cup
Cardamom powder - 1/4 tsp
Bura/Sugar Powder/Jaggery - 1 cup
********************************************************************

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 211
snippet.description:
The property papers are fake. Ragini reminds Lakshya that she owns the house and everyone should abide by her rules.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Ek Bhutiya Train Ki Sacchi Kahani - Paranormal Story of A Train (Zanetti Train)- AMF Ep 63
snippet.description:
Zanetti train story is a popular Italian urban legend. The story is fascinating. The story tells that  the train left Rome and went through the mountain tunnel in Lombard but it disappeared with the passengers inside the tunnel. It is one of the best paranormal stories.

Let us explore the story in this episode of AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore various amazing facts related to our amazing world. Know how enigmatic and astonishing our world is! This is the episode 63 of AMF.

snippet.description:

Episode 3152 : Bhide Is Taking Online Classes
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide  is taking online class but all his students don't join the class  on time . Bhide is unhappy  with their behavior so he complains to their parents. Bhide even asks them some simply questions but they are unable to answer to know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com

 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

#ExamPostponed #CAExamPostponed #NeerajArora

This is the perfect time to upskill yourself

😎 Get High Quality and Practical Skill Building Courses and Communities on Blockchain, Digital Marketing, Financial Modelling, MS-Excel, and More at Most Affordable Cost

🌎 Link: https://www.skill91.com 

👉 Use Promo code: "POSTPONE" TO GET FLAT 10% DISCOUNT ON ALL COURSES

🔥🔥 OFFER EXPIRES SOON!  🔥🔥
*
Prepare for your upcoming CA Intermediate/IPCC Exams in May 2021 and November 2021 With Confidence! 

👉 Visit: https://www.edu91.org 

👉 Check Out May 2021 Classes: https://www.edu91.org/s/pages/2021-may-classes 

👉Check Out November 2021 Classes: https://www.edu91.org/s/pages/nov-2021-classes 
 
Modes of Classes Available: Google Drive, Android App 

🔥🔥 Top Features of Our Classes: 🔥🔥 

✅ Maximum Coverage of ICAI Publications like Study Material, RTP, MTP etc. 
✅ Superb Conceptual Understanding 
✅ PDF Format Of Notes That Can Be Opened In Any Device 
✅ 3 Views: Highest In The Industry 
✅ Easy to use software and app. Completely Hassle Free. No Camera Required 
✅ Live Doubt Support 

*
Course Links-
🔥🔥EDU91 Revision Course for May/Nov 2021 - https://www.edu91.org/s/store/courses/description/ca-inter-revision-course-may2021-nov2021-edu91

*

Hi Guys! The Institute Of Chartered Accountant Of India has decided to postpone the CA Intermediate & Final exams which are scheduled to commence from 21st May 2021. ICAI has taken this decision due to the prevailing situation amid the coronavirus pandemic in the country.

The institute has released a notification for the same today. The ICAI further said that fresh dates for May 2021 examination will be intimated to students and a notice of at least 25 days will be given to students before commencement of the exams.

To know more in detail watch the video till the end

snippet.title: "PM Sir, Please Make A Phone Call": Arvind Kejriwal On Oxygen Crisis
snippet.description:
Covid-19 News: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Chief Minister of the 10 states worst hit by the deadly second wave of Covid on a day India touched a new record of 3.32 lakh Covid cases and 2,263 deaths in 24 hours. In an interaction that was live on TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal highlighted the crippling oxygen crisis in hospitals in the capital. "Please sir, we need your guidance," Mr Kejriwal said to the Prime Minister.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3152 - Sodhi Ne Bhide Ko Nehlaya! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi
